title: [TacZ] Elite x Quality Guns Zip Edition
description: Elite x quality guns now available as Zip file version
body:
## Elite x Quality Guns Now available as a ZIP file version

It is an Successor of Elite X Warfare Project adds ultra quality and immersive  weapons to the game , some of them are inpired by Cod Zombies and some of the personnel ones I want to add ,but this one is built for those who are having lots of issues who are playing in some larger modpacks where the mod version doesnt works. so this is the solution for this.


# Dependencies 
- For Forge, Timeless and Classics ZERO TACZ (1.18.2 - 1.20.1)
- For Fabric Tacz: Rebaricated ( 1.20.1 - 1.21.1)
- For Neoforge Tacz: unofficial Neoforge Port


- How to Install 
Simply create a folder named "tacz" in your minecraft directory and put the zip file there . Make sure to have Tacz mod installed in your mods folder

For the Best Experience in larger modpacks with over 100+ mods  this would be the best version to play around
